name: product-suite-marketplace
description: PM, Design & UX, and Development workflow tools for Claude Code

plugins.name: pm-claude-kit
plugins.description: Skills and agents for Product Managers: PRDs, user stories, meeting notes, competitive analysis, OKRs, and prioritization.

plugins.name: design-ux-kit
plugins.description: Skills and agents for Design & UX workflows: UX briefs, wireframe specs, design reviews, usability test plans, and design handoffs.

plugins.name: dev-workflow-kit
plugins.description: Skills and agents for Development workflows: technical specs, API specs, development plans, QA test plans, and bug reports.

plugins.name: exec-kit
plugins.description: Skills and agents for project execution: release planning with foundation-first dependency tracking, cycle planning, standups, retrospectives, status reports, and risk management. Designed for 1–2 person PM-led teams.
